description: Use this API to specify or return the current rating set, from 1 to 12. This API routine was first introduced in release 29.0.0. ierr = rating_set(ival) ierr, ival = rating_set()

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Value of the current rating set, from 1 to 12. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, 1 by default; else output).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
